calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Lesley Settle. CSR #10580 (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-21-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-20-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff: American Credit Agencies, Inc. and with witness, Ben Preston.
Haitham Ballout, Esq., for Defendant: Esam Ahmed Manea et al., also present.
10:30 a.m. - Parties present and have reached a settlement.
Essential terms were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to pay the sum of $3,800.00 by 3 installments in the amount of $1,266.67, starting Feb. 1, 2004 and on the first of each month there after. Payment to be in the form of official's check, payable to The California State Lottery, address to be provided in writting to the defendant by mail with in 48 hours.
Upon final payment on April 1, 2004, Plaintiif to dismissed the action with prejudice (within 5 days). If defendant fails to pay, Judgment to be entered.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement.
This matter is place on the CRC 225 calendar on April, 20, 2004 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 212, for dismissal.
Trial is vacated.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2003 Set For Trial On Jan-20-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
